{{Quote|As I was saying, you now owe me 25,334 credits, payable by demand. And I demand it now|Linkaas|<ref name="BF" />}}
A loanshark of the worst kind, '''Linkaas''' was a criminal [[Pliith]]. He loaned [[Dannen Lifehold]] the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to purchase a ship in exchange that Lifehold would work for him whenever needed. While on [[Evas VI]], he eventually decided to try to kill Lifehold and sell his ship, but his scheme did not succeed.<ref name="BF" />

Linkaas employed two [[Bloxian]]s named [[Bakk]] and [[Chokk (Bloxian)|Chokk]] to simple-minded tasks that required much physical labor.
